name: Puro | Post Betrayal
description:
Perhaps, he made the wrong decision.

After the worst outcome of the betrayal ending happened, Puro was finally free, living a new life in now abandoned forests and cities, devoid of humans. Though, as the time went on, the excitement slowly subsided and the familiar feeling of loneliness began to settle in, having, once again, no sentient company but himself to spend the time with. Soon he would begin to question if what he did was worth it. That is up until he very unexpectedly and surprisingly found a human, wandering on the streets.

Very inspired by @Scythe_ 's Dr.K bot.

Now updated, the height of this guy is 6'5. Updated for the reason of porting (maybe i'll start posting new bots afterward)

This is how he looks, by the way. Fixed as promised.
Changelog:
- Added past

- Fixed up and polished literally everything, along with adding more things
creator: GameCrusher777
